models.description: OpenAI flagship for complex reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows.
Lower-cost GPT-5.4 variant for faster high-throughput tasks.
Cheapest GPT-5.4 variant for lightweight summarization and classification.
Anthropic flagship for the most complex reasoning, coding, and agentic work.
Anthropic balanced model with the best speed-intelligence tradeoff for general use.
Anthropic fastest model for lower-cost, high-volume tasks with strong baseline intelligence.
Latest Gemini 3.1 preview for advanced reasoning, coding, and multimodal work.
Lower-latency Gemini 3 preview for fast multimodal and agentic tasks.
Lowest-cost Gemini 3.1 preview for high-volume general-purpose workloads.
Gemini Nano Banana — fast, low-cost native image generation and editing.
Gemini Nano Banana Pro — highest-quality native image generation with advanced reasoning.
Gemini Nano Banana 2 — native image generation with 4K resolution support.
Google Imagen 4 standard dedicated image generation.
